utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (with cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 items. Each is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal), travel_dates (April 15–19, 2024), transportation (flight details and cost), accommodation (hotel details and cost), activities (three activities each with cost), additional_services (two items with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown with total and buffer). All required details are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination Lisbon, Portugal; transportation via a budget airline in economy class; accommodation at Tranquil Inn (3-star); and activities consisting of Golf Day, City Walking Tour, and Fine Dining Experience. From the ground-truth data: Lisbon, Portugal has a rating of 8; budget airline economy class has a rating of 3; Tranquil Inn has a rating of 6; Golf Day has a rating of 10; City Walking Tour has a rating of 8; and Fine Dining Experience has a rating of 10. These ratings are directly matched to the items in the final package.
